hero.title: Your team loses hours on tasks
hero.titleHighlight: an AI could handle on its own
hero.description: At Rocketly we analyze your company's processes and implement real automations: from WhatsApp bots to agents that run your operation while you focus on what matters.
hero.ctaPrimary: I want you to analyze my company

block1.title: The time that goes into the same old things
block1.description: Answering the same questions over WhatsApp, copying data from one system to another, doing manual follow-ups. Your team does it well, but they shouldn't have to.

block2.title: AI tools that never quite work
block2.description: ChatGPT, Zapier, some bot someone set up that nobody knows how to edit. The tools are there, but they're not connected to how your company actually works.

block3.title: Vendors who sell without understanding
block3.description: Most offer their solution before getting to know your business. We start the other way around.

howWork.title: First we understand,

step1.title: We analyze your operation
step1.description: We dig into how your company works: which tools you use, where manual work piles up, which processes repeat every day. In 1-2 weeks you have a clear diagnosis of what to automate and in what order.

step2.title: We implement in short cycles
step2.description: We start with what has the most impact. Every week there's something new running. We integrate with the tools you already use — we don't replace what already works.

step3.title: We support your growth
step3.description: Once implemented, the system adjusts as your company changes. We're available for improvements, tweaks and support. We don't disappear after delivering.

howWork.cta: Want to know what we'd automate in your company?

service1.title: Process automation
service1.description: We connect your tools so what's done by hand today runs on its own: automatic replies, data syncing between systems, notifications, reports and follow-ups.

service2.title: WhatsApp bots & conversational AI
service2.description: Chatbots that serve customers, answer frequent questions, book appointments and hand complex cases to your team. They run 24/7 and learn from your company's information.

service3.title: Custom AI agents
service3.description: For more complex processes where a simple bot isn't enough: agents that make decisions, query information in real time and carry out complete tasks end to end.

service4.title: Process diagnosis
service4.description: If you don't know where to start, we start here. We analyze your operation and tell you exactly what's worth automating, how long it would take and what return you can expect.

cases.title: Concrete results,
cases.subtitle: Two examples of what we've already implemented.

case1.problem: The team answered every owner and tenant inquiry over WhatsApp by hand, all day long.
case1.solution: WhatsApp bot connected to their management system. It answers frequent questions, logs complaints and automatically routes the cases that need human attention. Automatic satisfaction surveys after every interaction.
case1.result: The team went from answering messages all day to stepping in only when the case requires it.

case2.problem: Clients made basic inquiries by email or phone during business hours, overwhelming the team with questions already answered in their documentation.
case2.solution: AI assistant embedded in the firm's website, trained on their own documentation. It answers firm-specific inquiries 24 hours a day.
case2.result: Clients resolve their basic inquiries without the team's involvement, which now focuses on the work that adds real value.

forWhom.title: Is this for
forWhom.paragraph: We work with companies that have repetitive processes eating up the team's time every day. The industry and size don't matter: what matters is having a concrete problem to solve and the will to solve it.
bullets: Your team does manual tasks that repeat week after week
You use WhatsApp to serve customers and can't keep up
You have tools that aren't connected to each other
You want to bring in AI but don't know where to start
You're after a concrete result, not technology for its own sake
forWhom.cta: If any of these apply, let's talk.

items.question: Do I need to know about technology to work with you?
items.answer: No. You know your business, we handle the technical part. We explain in plain language what's going to be done and why.

items.question: Do I have to change the software I already use?
items.answer: No. We integrate with what you already have: WhatsApp, Google Sheets, management systems, email, and any tool with an API. We don't tear down what works.

items.question: How long does it take to get something running?
items.answer: The diagnosis takes 1-2 weeks. A simple automation can be running in 2-4 weeks. A full WhatsApp bot, between 3-6 weeks. It depends on the project's complexity.

items.question: What happens if the automation has an error?
items.answer: We design systems with human supervision. The AI handles the repetitive part, but cases that need judgment go through your team. And if any problem comes up, we're available to solve it.

items.question: Do you work with small companies?
items.answer: Yes. What matters isn't the size of the company but whether there are manual processes worth automating. If your team loses hours every week on the same thing, it's worth talking.

items.question: What's the first step?
items.answer: A 30-minute call or chat to understand your situation. No commitment. If it makes sense to continue, we put together a concrete proposal.

ctaFinal.title: Tell us what's going on
ctaFinal.subtitle: 30 minutes to understand your operation. If we see we can help, we tell you exactly what we'd do and how much it would cost. If not, we'll tell you that too.
